Monday - Thursday - 5pm to midnight
Friday - 5pm to 2am
Saturday - noon to 2am
Sunday - noon to midnight
21+ EXCEPT SATURDAYS AND SUNDAYS BEFORE 5PM. NO RESERVATIONS.
First come first served unless you book a private event for all lanes and soft seating areas and booths. Max of 2 lanes and 2 hours at the lanes.
VALET PARKING ($8 plus gratuity) IS AVAILABLE DURING ALL HOURS OF OPERATION.
